---
title: "Can data activism strengthen the agency of 'common' users? An empirical study of oppositional affordances and use positions toward Facebook"
author: "Papa, V., Milioni, D., and Djouvas, C."
date: 2021-01-01
description: "Annual Conference of International Association of Media and Communication Research (IAMCR 2021)"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
